questions.question_text: Answer the following questions CO Mapping a What do we mean by machine learning? Discuss the different categorizes of ML algorithms in detail. b Difference between active learning and reinforcement learning. c Explain data augmentation techniques for imbalanced dataset. d Discuss the three types of clustering methods in detail.
Discuss the Principal component analysis in detail. Explain its working in detail along with diagram. 10
What is feature selection in machine learning? Discuss each method in detail. 10
Describe Support Vector Machine . Discuss about each kernal functions used in SVM in detail. 10
What do we mean by ensemble learning? Explain the different techniques: Bagging, Boosting, XGBoost, AdaBoost. 10
Elaborate on unsupervised learning. Explain the centroid based clustering along with k-means and k-medoids. 10
Explain the self-organizing maps. Illustrate the use of elbow method in clustering along with diagram 10
Explain the Gradient Descent Algorithm. Discuss the role of backpropagation in neural network. 10
Discuss the reinforcement learning. Mention it's application and case study in medical area in detail. 10
